_meta.notes: 113-seat Legislature. 73 district seats + 34 party-list (proportional) + 6 indigenous seats. Source: CEC db.cec.gov.tw. District-level results pending — feature IDs must be verified against taiwan-atlas districts-10t.json. Seat totals are official CEC final results.

seat_breakdown.notes: KMT: 36 district + 13 party-list + 3 indigenous. DPP: 36 district + 13 party-list + 2 indigenous. TPP: 8 party-list. IND: 2 district (indigenous).
